title: Podman event not received on stopping/starting container
body:
### Issue Description

I have subscribed to podman events with filter (events - died, stop, start). On stopping/starting using podman CLI commands. Sometimes, I am not receiving podman events. This issue is intermittent.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Start a container.
2. Subscribe to podman event with filter (events - died, stop, start).
3. Execute 'podman stop [containerName]' & 'podman start [containerName]' continuously.

### Describe the results you received

For some start/stop command, I did not get events from podman.

### Describe the results you expected

For every start/stop command, I must get events from podman.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
